title: US couldn't defeat Hamas and will not defeat Iran - begging for ceasefire
snippet: US couldn't defeat Hamas and will not defeat Iran. U guys are begging for a ceasefire hahahhhahah.

title: Iran says NO to ceasefire until US stops being genocidal maniacs - demands 1948 borders
snippet: Iran says no until US stops being racist colonial settler apartheid-loving genocidal maniacs who grant Palestinians the right of return. Get behind 1948 borders, not an inch further. Then maybe a ceasefire.

title: Unilateral ceasefire impossible - Iran strategically winning with nothing left to lose
snippet: If Iran thinks it is strategically winning AND materially has nothing left to lose, how will even a unilateral ceasefire be possible? A threat acted on is not a threat - which is Iran's motivation to reopen Hormuz.

title: Ceasefire = risk-on explosion across crypto - Liquidity tsunami from Fed/Treasury/China
snippet: Liquidity tsunami from Fed, Treasury, and China - only the US-Iran war is holding the pump back. Ceasefire = risk-on explosion across crypto. BTC and alts about to rip.

title: Iran attacks Kuwait and Israel after Trump sets deadline for deal
snippet: Iran attacks Kuwait, Israel after Trump sets deadline for deal.

title: Strait of Hormuz closed - US bases bombed - Trump begging for ceasefire from Iran
snippet: Strait of Hormuz is closed. US bases bombed. Israel getting pounded. Trump begging for help from Europe, and for a ceasefire from Iran. Even pretending he is engaged in behind scenes negotiations with Iran.

title: Trump lifted sanctions on Iranian oil - Higher oil price = huge revenue for Iran
snippet: Trump has lifted sanctions on Iranian oil due to supply crisis. Higher price means huge revenue for Iran. Nuclear deal being asked is same as Obama's when sanctions were lifted.

title: WSJ: US Military Assets Damaged or Lost in the Iran War - Economic catastrophe
snippet: War assessment: 2-week war not won, no regime change, no nuke disbandment. Hundreds of children and civilians killed, billions in US military assets destroyed, economic catastrophe.

title: Trump warns: ~48 hours remain before all Hell reigns down - Strait of Hormuz ultimatum
snippet: Trump posted warning: 10-day deadline for Iran to make a deal or open Strait of Hormuz, ~48 hours remain before all Hell reigns down. Ongoing US-Israel war on Iran since Feb.

title: Trump warns Iran: 48 hours to make a deal or face consequences over Strait of Hormuz
snippet: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a fresh warning to Iran, urging it to strike a deal or face consequences over the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

title: US airman rescued in Iran in miraculous operation - Breitbart
snippet: Trump says US airman rescued in Iran in 'miraculous' operation.

title: Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make a deal, hunt continues for missing US pilot - JPost
snippet: Donald Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make a deal, as hunt goes on for missing US pilot. Trump warns 'all hell will reign down' before deadline.

title: Iran using 20% global oil flow as financial crowbar - 15-point ceasefire = dollar decline roadmap
snippet: Iran is using the 20% global oil flow as a financial crowbar. Proposal to settle in Euro/Yuan is about forcing breach in Western sanctions wall. If EU agrees, 15-point ceasefire becomes roadmap for systemic decline of the dollar.

title: Ceasefire odds drop to 1% - Oman and Iran discuss maritime transit
snippet: Oman and Iran discuss maritime transit as ceasefire odds drop to 1%.

title: WSJ: Tehran agreed to deal leaving nuclear infrastructure intact - Iran never stopped pursuing the bomb
snippet: Like Pyongyang, Tehran agreed to a deal that didn't require it to come clean about past nuclear activities and left nuclear infrastructure intact for the future. Iran's regime never stopped pursuing the bomb.

title: Trump National Economic Council Chair tried to blame Biden for gas prices - got shot down on Fox
snippet: Trump's National Economic Council Chair just tried to blame Joe Biden for gas prices. AND GOT SHOT DOWN ON FOX.

title: Oil prices crossing above $115/barrel - CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7% if sustained
snippet: Oil prices are now crossing above $115/barrel in the US. As a result, our models indicate that if current levels are sustained another ~7 weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7%. This would put US inflation at its highest level since September 2023.

title: Most eventful weekend of the Iran War yet - Futures open in 8 hours
snippet: Futures open in 8 hours amid one of the most eventful weekends of the Iran War yet. Follow us @KobeissiLetter and turn on our post notifications for real-time analysis.

title: Trump threatened to reign hell on Iran, declared Tuesday as Power Plant and Bridge Day
snippet: President Trump has threatened to 'reign hell' on Iran, declared Tuesday as 'Power Plant and Bridge Day,' and US forces continue operations. Most eventful weekend of the Iran War yet.
